## Problem Statement

A description of the problem this feature would solve. Ex: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request.
